findings.title: Open service: http on 10.10.0.20:3000
findings.evidence: http on 3000/tcp — title: OWASP Juice Shop
findings.remediation: Ensure the application is patched and not exposed to untrusted networks.

findings.title: Open service: ssh on 10.10.0.20:22
findings.remediation: Restrict SSH to management hosts and enforce key-based authentication.
